payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed center panel and simple top molding, matte finish with faint scuffs; the right edge is cropped and partially occluded by another object, suggesting a full-height wall or pantry cabinet approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
